error_signature: toTitleCase does not change uppercase letters
title: toTitleCase does not convert all caps to title case
symptom: When using the .toTitleCase() function on an all caps string, the output remains unchanged. The expected output is not achieved.
applies_when: Using .toTitleCase() on an all caps string
not_this_if: Input string is not in all caps
Using a different string manipulation method
root_cause: The .toTitleCase() function in n8n is designed to preserve uppercase letters to avoid losing information from acronyms and trademarks. Therefore, it does not convert all caps strings to title case as expected.
fix_steps: Convert the input string to lowercase using .toLowerCase()
agent_instruction: Use the expression '{{ $json.input.toLowerCase().toTitleCase() }}' to achieve the desired title case output.
